title: FabAlley South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: FabAlley South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley South Asia Partners:
FabAlley South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley South Asia Partners!
